ViDR treats source figures as retrievable, interpretable, routable, and verifiable evidence objects, while still generating analytical charts when needed. It builds an evidence-indexed outline linking claims to textual and visual evidence, refines noisy web images into source-figure evidence atoms through context-aware filtering, outline-aware reranking, and VLM-based visual analysis, and generates each section with section-specific evidence. ViDR further validates visual references to reduce hallucinated or misplaced figures. We also introduce MMR Bench+, a benchmark for evaluating visual evidence use in deep research reports, covering source-figure retrieval, placement, interpretation, verifiability, and analytical chart generation. Experiments show that ViDR improves overall report quality, source-figure integration, and verifiability over strong commercial and open-source baselines. These results suggest that source visual evidence is important for multimodal deep research, as it strengthens evidential grounding, visual support, and report verifiability.

AI.tldr: ViDR是一个多模态深度研究框架，将源图像视为可检索、可解释、可路由和可验证的证据对象，通过构建证据索引大纲、上下文感知过滤、基于大纲的重排序和VLM视觉分析来生成有据可查的长篇报告，显著提升了报告的视觉证据基础和可验证性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度研究系统大多以文本为中心，主要依赖文本证据生成报告；多模态系统要么对图像的检索和利用较弱，要么自行生成图表而非利用源图像作为证据，导致源图像作为视觉证据的潜力未被充分利用，存在证据基础薄弱和可验证性不足的问题。
AI.method: ViDR将源图像视为四类证据对象（可检索、可解释、可路由、可验证），构建将文本和视觉证据链接到报告论点的证据索引大纲，通过上下文感知过滤去除噪声网页图像、基于大纲的重排序筛选相关图像、VLM驱动的视觉分析提取细粒度证据，在生成每个章节时使用章节特定的证据，并通过视觉引用验证机制减少幻觉或位置不当的图表。同时提出了MMR Bench+基准用于评估深度研究报告中视觉证据的检索、放置、解释、可验证性和图表生成质量。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，ViDR在整体报告质量、源图像整合能力和可验证性方面显著超越了包括商业和开源模型在内的强基线系统，验证了源视觉证据在多模态深度研究中的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 源视觉证据对于多模态深度研究至关重要，能够有效增强报告的证据基础、视觉支持和可验证性，为未来多模态长文档生成系统的发展提供了重要方向。

title: IdeaForge: A Knowledge Graph-Grounded Multi-Agent Framework for Cross-Methodology Innovation Analysis and Patent Claim Generation
summary: Current AI-assisted innovation systems typically apply a single ideation methodology (such as TRIZ or Design Thinking) using sequential prompt-based workflows that do not preserve intermediate reasoning structure. As a result, insights generated across methodologies remain fragmented, limiting traceability, synthesis, and systematic evaluation of novelty. We present IdeaForge, a knowledge graph-grounded multi-agent framework for innovation analysis and patent claim generation. IdeaForge integrates multiple innovation methodologies (TRIZ, Design Thinking, and SCAMPER) through specialist agents operating over a persistent FalkorDB knowledge graph. Each agent contributes structured entities and relationships representing contradictions, inventive principles, user needs, transformations, analogies, and candidate claims. The central contribution of IdeaForge is a cross-methodology convergence mechanism implemented through graph-based claim linkage. Claims independently supported by multiple methodologies are connected using CONVERGENT relationships, enabling identification of high-confidence innovation candidates through graph traversal. A downstream patent drafting agent generates structured patent drafts grounded in convergent claim subgraphs, reducing reliance on unconstrained language model generation. An InnovationScore formula ranks claims by convergent support, methodology diversity, claim strength, and prior art challenge count. We describe the graph schema, agent architecture, convergence detection pipeline, and patent synthesis workflow. Experiments on a legal technology use case demonstrate that graph-grounded multi-methodology synthesis produces more diverse and traceable innovation candidates compared to single-methodology baselines. We discuss implications for computational creativity, explainable AI-assisted invention, and graph-native innovation systems.

AI.tldr: IdeaForge 提出了一种基于知识图谱的多智能体框架，通过融合 TRIZ、Design Thinking 和 SCAMPER 等多种创新方法，并利用跨方法收敛机制和图表征实现高置信度创新候选方案的识别与专利草案生成，在可追溯性、多样性和系统性评估方面优于单方法基线。
AI.motivation: 当前的 AI 辅助创新系统通常采用单一路径的提示驱动工作流，仅应用单一创新方法论（如 TRIZ 或 Design Thinking），且无法保留中间推理结构，导致跨方法生成的知识碎片化，缺乏可追溯性、综合性和对新奇性的系统评估能力。
AI.method: IdeaForge 构建了一个基于 FalkorDB 持久化知识图谱的多智能体框架，包含多个 specialist agent（分别对应 TRIZ、Design Thinking 和 SCAMPER），每个智能体向图谱中注入结构化的实体和关系（如矛盾、发明原则、用户需求、转换、类比和候选权利要求）。核心创新在于跨方法收敛机制：通过图遍历识别被多个方法共同支持的 claim，并以 CONVERGENT 关系进行连接，形成收敛 claim 子图；下游专利撰写智能体基于收敛子图生成结构化专利草案，减少对无约束语言模型生成的依赖。此外，设计了 InnovationScore 公式，综合收敛支持度、方法多样性、claim 强度和 prior art 挑战数量对 claim 进行排序。
AI.result: 在法律技术用例上的实验表明，基于知识图谱的多方法合成方法相比单方法基线，能够生成更多样化且更具可追溯性的创新候选方案。
AI.conclusion: IdeaForge 展示了知识图谱驱动的多方法融合在计算创造力、可解释 AI 辅助发明和图原生创新系统方面的潜力，为跨方法推理的结构化合成与高置信度创新候选的自动识别提供了可行的技术路径。

title: R^2-Mem: Reflective Experience for Memory Search
summary: Deep search has recently emerged as a promising paradigm for enabling agents to retrieve fine-grained historical information without heavy memory pre-managed. However, existing deep search agents for memory system repeat past error behaviors because they fail to learn from the prior high- and low-quality search trajectories. To address this limitation, we propose R^2-Mem, a reflective experience framework for memory search systems. In the offline stage, a Rubric-guided Evaluator scores low- and high-quality steps in historical trajectories, and a self-Reflection Learner distills the corresponding abstract experience. During the online inference, the retrieved experience will guide future search actions to avoid repeated mistakes and maintain high-quality behaviors. Extensive experiments demonstrate that R^2-Mem consistently improves both effectiveness and efficiency over strong baselines, improving F1 scores by up to 22.6%, while reducing token consumption by 12.9% and search iterations by 20.2%. These results verify that R^2-Mem provides a RL-free and low-cost solution for self-improving LLM agents.

AI.tldr: R^2-Mem提出了一个基于反思性经验框架的检索记忆系统，通过离线阶段对历史轨迹进行质量评分与抽象经验蒸馏，在在线推理中引导智能体避免重复错误，在无需强化学习的情况下显著提升了检索效果与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有深度搜索智能体在记忆系统中会重复过去的错误行为，原因在于它们无法从先前的高质量和低质量搜索轨迹中学习经验，缺乏自我改进的机制。
AI.method: R^2-Mem包含离线与在线两个阶段。离线阶段中，Rubric-guided Evaluator对历史搜索轨迹的每一步进行高低质量评分，随后self-Reflection Learner从中蒸馏出对应的抽象经验；在线推理时，检索到的经验将指导后续搜索动作，从而避免重复错误并维持高质量行为。
AI.result: 实验结果表明R^2-Mem在多个强基线上持续提升了效果与效率：F1分数最高提升22.6%，同时token消耗降低12.9%，搜索迭代次数减少20.2%。
AI.conclusion: R^2-Mem提供了一种无需强化学习、低成本的智能体自我改进方案，验证了通过反思性经验框架可以有效增强LLM智能体在记忆系统中的搜索与决策能力。

title: Revealing the Gap in Human and VLM Scene Perception through Counterfactual Semantic Saliency
summary: Evaluating whether large vision-language models (VLMs) align with human perception for high-level semantic scene comprehension remains a challenge. Traditional white-box interpretability methods are inapplicable to closed-source architectures and passive metrics fail to isolate causal features. We introduce Counterfactual Semantic Saliency (CSS). This black-box, model-agnostic framework quantifies the importance of objects by measuring the semantic shift induced by their causal ablation from a scene. To evaluate AI-human semantic alignment, we tested prominent VLMs against a human psychophysics baseline comprising 16,289 valid responses across 307 complex natural scenes and 1,306 high-fidelity counterfactual variants. Our analysis reveals a pervasive scene comprehension gap: models exhibit an overreliance (relative to humans) on large objects (size bias), objects at the center of the image (center bias), and high saliency objects. In contrast, models rely less on people in the scenes than our human participants to describe the images. A model's size bias is a primary driver explaining variations in model-human semantic divergence. Code and data will be available at https://github.com/starsky77/Counterfactual-Semantic-Saliency.

AI.tldr: 提出Counterfactual Semantic Saliency (CSS)框架，通过因果消融对象并测量语义偏移来量化VLM对场景中物体重要性的感知，发现VLM与人类之间存在系统性语义对齐差距，包括尺寸偏差、中心偏差和显著物体偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以评估大视觉语言模型（VLM）在高层次语义场景理解上是否与人类感知对齐，白盒可解释性方法不适用于闭源模型，被动指标无法隔离因果特征，因此需要一种黑盒、模型无关的框架来量化VLM的语义重要性归因并比较其与人类感知的差异。
AI.method: 提出Counterfactual Semantic Saliency (CSS)框架，通过从场景中因果消融（移除）对象并测量模型输出语义的偏移量来量化每个对象的重要性；将VLM的物体重要性排序与人类心理物理学基线（16,289条有效响应，307个场景，1,306个反事实变体）进行对比，以评估AI-人类语义对齐程度。
AI.result: VLM相比人类表现出系统性偏差：过度依赖大物体（尺寸偏差）、图像中心物体（中心偏差）和高显著物体；对场景中人物的依赖程度低于人类参与者；模型尺寸偏差是驱动模型-人类语义差异的主要因素。
AI.conclusion: VLM在场景理解中存在普遍的语义对齐差距，模型对物体大小、位置和显著性存在非人类似的偏好，而人类更关注社会性物体（人物）；尺寸偏差是解释模型与人类语义差异的核心因素，表明需要对VLM的感知偏差进行进一步校准。

title: Ego2World: Compiling Egocentric Cooking Videos into Executable Worlds for Belief-State Planning
summary: Embodied agents in household environments must plan under partial observation: they need to remember objects, track state changes, and recover when actions fail. Existing benchmarks only partially test this ability. Egocentric video datasets capture realistic human activities but remain passive, while interactive simulators support execution but rely on synthetic scenes and hand-crafted dynamics, introducing a sim-to-real gap and often assuming fully observable state. We introduce Ego2World, an executable benchmark that turns egocentric cooking videos into executable symbolic worlds governed by graph-transition rules. Built on HD-EPIC, Ego2World derives reusable transition rules from video annotations and executes them in a hidden symbolic world graph. During evaluation, the simulator maintains the hidden world graph, while the agent plans over its own partial belief graph using only local observations and execution feedback. This separation forces agents to update memory and replan without observing the true world state. Experiments show that action-overlap scores overestimate physical-state success, and that persistent belief memory improves task completion while reducing repeated visual exploration -- suggesting that belief maintenance should be a first-class target of embodied-agent evaluation.

AI.tldr: Ego2World 将从真实第一人称烹饪视频中提取的交互转化为可执行的符号世界图，通过在部分可观测条件下迫使智能体更新信念内存和重新规划，揭示了持久信念维护是具身智能体评估的关键目标。
AI.motivation: 现有具身智能体基准仅部分测试了部分可观测规划能力：第一人称视频数据集是被动的，无法执行交互；交互模拟器使用合成场景和手工设计的动态规则，存在仿真到现实差距且通常假设完全可观测状态，缺乏对真实世界中部分可观测性和动作失败恢复能力的系统评估。
AI.method: Ego2World 基于 HD-EPIC 视频数据集，从视频标注中提取可复用的图转换规则，将烹饪视频转化为一个隐藏的符号世界图。评估时，模拟器维护隐藏的世界图，而智能体仅基于局部观测和执行反馈维护自身的部分信念图进行规划，两者分离迫使智能体在无法观测真实世界状态的情况下更新记忆并重新规划。
AI.result: 实验表明，动作重叠分数会高估物理状态的成功率；持久信念记忆能够提高任务完成率并减少重复的视觉探索，表明信念维护应成为具身智能体评估的核心目标。
AI.conclusion: 持久信念记忆对部分可观测条件下的任务完成至关重要，信念维护应当作为具身智能体评估的首要目标，这为未来在更真实、更具挑战性的部分可观测环境中设计智能体提供了重要方向。

title: Locale-Conditioned Few-Shot Prompting Mitigates Demonstration Regurgitation in On-Device PII Substitution with Small Language Models
summary: Personally Identifiable Information (PII) redaction usually replaces detected entities with placeholder tokens such as [PERSON], destroying the downstream utility of the redacted text for retrieval and Named Entity Recognition (NER) training. We propose a fully on-device pipeline that substitutes PII with consistent, type-preserving fake values: a 1.5 B mixture-of-experts token classifier (openai/privacy-filter) detects spans, a 1-bit Bonsai-1.7B Small Language Model (SLM) proposes contextual surrogates for names, addresses, and dates, and a rule-based generator (faker) handles patterned fields. We report a prompting finding more important than the quantization choice: with naive fixed three-shot demonstrations, the 1-bit SLM regurgitates demonstration outputs verbatim regardless of input; 1.58-bit Ternary-Bonsai-1.7B reproduces byte-identical failures, ruling out quantization as the cause. We fix this with locale-conditioned rotating few-shot demonstrations: a character-range heuristic picks a locale-pure pool and a per-input MD5 hash samples three demonstrations. With the fix, 482/482 unique Bonsai-1.7B calls succeed (no echoes) and produce locale-correct surrogates, although the SLM still copies from a small same-locale demonstration pool - a residual narrowness we quantify. On a 2000-document multilingual corpus, hybrid perplexity (PPL) beats faker in all six locales under a multilingual evaluator (XGLM-564M); length preservation is best-of-three in 4 of 6 locales. On downstream NER (400 train / 100 test, English), redact yields F1=0.000, faker 0.656, original 0.960; on a matched 160/40 subset including hybrid, faker (0.506) outperforms hybrid (0.346) at p < 0.001. We report this as an honest negative finding: SLM surrogates produce more natural text but a less varied training distribution, and downstream NER benefits more from variety than from naturalness.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种端侧PII脱敏流水线，使用混合专家模型检测、小语言模型生成类型保真且一致的虚假值替代占位符，发现少样本提示方式比量化精度更关键，并通过locale条件旋转演示解决了SLM的逐字复制问题；但下游NER实验表明，SLM生成的更自然文本因分布多样性不足反而降低了训练效果。
AI.motivation: 传统PII脱敏方法将检测到的实体替换为[PERSON]等占位符，破坏了脱敏文本在下游检索和NER训练中的可用性；现有基于生成模型的替代方案面临模型规模过大、一致性不足或输出多样性受限等问题。
AI.method: 提出全端侧流水线：用1.5B混合专家token分类器(openai/privacy-filter)检测PII跨度，1-bit Bonsai-1.7B小语言模型为姓名、地址、日期生成上下文相关的替代值，规则生成器(faker)处理模式化字段；通过locale条件旋转少样本演示（字符范围启发式选择locale纯池，MD5哈希采样3个演示）解决SLM逐字复制演示输出的问题。
AI.result: 482/482次Bonsai-1.7B调用成功生成locale正确的替代值无回显；在2000文档多语言语料上混合PPL在全部6个locale中优于faker，长度保留在4/6个locale中最佳；下游NER（英文400训练/100测试）中faker F1=0.656，混合方法F1=0.346（p<0.001），原始文本F1=0.960，脱敏方法F1=0.000。
AI.conclusion: SLM生成的替代文本更自然但训练分布多样性不足，下游NER任务更受益于多样性而非自然性；这一诚实的负面发现表明，在生成式PII脱敏中，替代文本的多样性比表面自然度对下游训练更重要。

title: Flow Augmentation and Knowledge Distillation for Lightweight Face Presentation Attack Detection
comment: Accepted at 2026 International Conference on Automatic Face and Gesture Recognition (FG)
summary: Face presentation attack detection (FacePAD) remains challenging under diverse spoofing representation, including 2D print and replay, 3D mask-based spoofing, makeup-induced appearance manipulation, and physical occlusions, as well as under varying capture conditions. Motion cues are highly discriminative for FacePAD but typically require explicit optical flow estimation, which introduces substantial computational overhead and limits real-time deployment. In this work, we leverage optical flow to enhance motion representation during training while eliminating the need for flow computation at inference. We propose a dual-branch teacher model that fuses appearance cues from RGB frames with motion cues derived from colorwheel-encoded optical flow, enabling effective modeling of micro-motions and temporal consistency. To enable efficient deployment, we introduce a knowledge distillation framework that transfers motion-aware knowledge from the flow-augmented teacher to a lightweight RGB-only student via logit distillation. As a result, the student implicitly learns motion-sensitive representations without requiring explicit flow estimation or additional feature extraction blocks at inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate strong performance across multiple benchmarks, achieving 0.0% HTER on Replay-Attack and Replay-Mobile, 0.94% HTER on ROSE-Youtu, 5.65% HTER on SiW-Mv2, and 0.42% ACER on OULU-NPU. The distilled student achieves performance comparable to or better than the teacher while significantly reducing parameters and FLOPs, achieving 52 FPS on an NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, indicating its suitability for real-time and resource-constrained FacePAD deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于知识蒸馏的活体检测框架，利用光流增强训练阶段的运动表征，使学生网络在推理时仅依赖RGB输入即可隐式学习运动敏感特征，无需光流计算，在多个基准上取得优异性能并支持实时部署。
AI.motivation: 人脸呈现攻击检测在多样化欺骗手段和采集条件下仍具挑战，运动线索对该任务高度有效，但现有方法依赖显式光流估计，计算开销大，难以满足实时和资源受限场景的部署需求。
AI.method: 提出双分支教师模型，融合RGB帧的外观线索与色环编码光流的运动线索，建模微运动与时间一致性；引入知识蒸馏框架，通过logit蒸馏将运动感知知识从光流增强的教师迁移至轻量级纯RGB学生网络，使学生推理时不需光流估计或额外特征提取模块。
AI.result: 在Replay-Attack和Replay-Mobile上达到0.0% HTER，在ROSE-Youtu上达0.94% HTER，在SiW-Mv2上达5.65% HTER，在OULU-NPU上达0.42% ACER；蒸馏后学生模型参数量和FLOPs大幅降低，在NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano上达52 FPS，性能与教师相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过训练阶段引入光流增强运动表征并结合知识蒸馏，可有效消除推理时的光流计算负担，实现高效且高性能的活体检测，为资源受限环境下的实时FacePAD部署提供可行方案。

title: Multi-Agent Systems in Emergency Departments: Validation Study on a ED Digital Twin
summary: Emergency departments (ED) face challenges in patient care and resource management. We propose to explore optimization strategies in a realistic and flexible model and develop a hybrid Discrete Event Simulation (DES) and Agent-Based Model (ABM) simulating highly configurable ED environments. We specifically focus on the validation of the modeling approach. We derive configurations for ED sizes, patient load, and staffing from real-world studies. We then validate the model expressivity by matching its key performance indicators and metrics with their values known from literature. We proceed by implementing scientifically established and practice-proven resource optimization strategies. Comparing the documented real-world outcomes with our model's results demonstrates that the DES-ABM based simulation can effectively replicate real-world ER dynamics under interventions. We lastly integrate a Proof-of-Concept multi-agent system (MAS) that can autonomously explore resource allocation strategies within the simulated ER environment based on a temporal ledger of ED event records. This modular DES-ABM-MAS framework offers a powerful tool to explore resource optimization strategies in emergency departments.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种混合DES-ABM-MAS框架，通过离散事件仿真与多智能体系统模拟急诊科环境，并验证其能有效复现真实急诊科在资源优化干预下的动态表现。
AI.motivation: 急诊科面临患者护理和资源管理的挑战，现有模型在真实性和灵活性上存在不足，缺乏一个既能真实模拟急诊科动态又能自主探索资源分配策略的可验证仿真框架。
AI.method: 构建了混合离散事件仿真（DES）和基于智能体的模型（ABM）框架，从真实研究中提取急诊科规模、患者负荷和人员配置等参数，通过匹配文献中的关键性能指标验证模型表达力，并集成了基于时间账本的多智能体系统（MAS）以自主探索资源分配策略。
AI.result: 模型成功复现了文献中已知的急诊科关键性能指标；在实施科学验证和实践验证的资源优化策略后，模型的仿真结果与实际真实世界的干预效果一致，证明了DES-ABM仿真能够有效复现真实急诊科在干预下的动态行为。
AI.conclusion: 该模块化的DES-ABM-MAS框架为探索急诊科资源优化策略提供了功能强大的工具，能够灵活配置环境并实现多智能体自主决策，对提升急诊科管理和决策支持具有重要应用价值。

title: Where Does Reasoning Break? Step-Level Hallucination Detection via Hidden-State Transport Geometry
summary: Large language models hallucinate during multi-step reasoning, but most existing detectors operate at the trace level: they assign one confidence score to a full output, fail to localize the first error, and often require multiple sampled completions. We frame hallucination instead as a property of the hidden-state trajectory produced during a single forward pass. Correct reasoning moves through a stable manifold of locally coherent transitions; a first error appears as a localized excursion in transport cost away from this manifold. We operationalize this view with a label-conditioned teacher that builds a trace-specific contrastive PCA lens and scores each step with seven geometric transition features, and a deployable BiLSTM student distilled from the teacher that operates on raw hidden states without inference-time labels. We prove that contrastive PCA is the optimal projection for a transport-separation objective between first error and correct states, and that single-pass first error localization holds whenever the first error creates a positive transport margin over preceding correct transitions. On ProcessBench, PRM800K, HaluEval, and TruthfulQA, both models outperform entropy-based, probing-based, and attention-based baselines in-domain; the teacher transfers stably across language models and datasets, while the student collapses under shift, a gap our distillation theory predicts. These results recast step-level hallucination detection as a problem of trajectory dynamics and identify the central obstacle to deployment: preserving the contrastive transport margin under distribution shift.

AI.tldr: 本文将多步推理中的幻觉检测重新定义为隐藏状态轨迹动力学问题，提出基于对比PCA的教师模型和蒸馏BiLSTM学生模型，利用传输成本度量定位首次错误步骤，并理论证明了该方法的检测条件与分布偏移下的性能瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有幻觉检测器工作在轨迹级别，为完整输出分配单一置信度，无法定位首次错误步骤，且通常需要多次采样；本文旨在将幻觉检测从粗粒度的轨迹评分推进到细粒度的步骤级首次错误定位。
AI.method: 将幻觉视为单次前向传播中隐藏状态轨迹的属性，正确推理位于稳定流形上，首次错误表现为传输成本偏离流形的局部偏移；提出标签条件教师模型，通过对比PCA构建轨迹特定投影，并基于七种几何过渡特征为每一步评分；进一步蒸馏出可部署的BiLSTM学生模型，仅依赖原始隐藏状态。理论上证明了对比PCA对首次错误与正确状态之间的传输分离目标是最优投影，并给出了单次前向传播定位首次错误的充分条件（正传输余量）。
AI.result: 在ProcessBench、PRM800K、HaluEval和TruthfulQA上，教师和学生模型在域内均优于基于熵、探针和注意力的基线；教师模型可跨模型和数据集稳定迁移，但学生模型在分布偏移下性能崩溃，这一差距被蒸馏理论所预测。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了步骤级幻觉检测的本质是轨迹动力学问题，核心障碍在于分布偏移下保持对比传输余量；研究为单次前向传播中实时定位推理错误提供了理论框架和实践方案。

title: Multi-Modal Guided Multi-Source Domain Adaptation for Object Detection
summary: General object detection (OD) struggles to detect objects in the target domain that differ from the training distribution. To address this, recent studies demonstrate that training from multiple source domains and explicitly processing them separately for multi-source domain adaptation (MSDA) outperforms blending them for unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA). However, existing MSDA methods learn domain-agnostic features from domain-specific RGB images while preserving domain-specific information from the domain-agnostic feature map. To address this, we propose MS-DePro: Multi-Source Detector with Depth and Prompt, composed of (1) depth-guided localization and (2) multi-modal guided prompt learning. We leverage domain-agnostic input modalities, namely depth maps and text, to encode domain-agnostic characteristics. Specifically, we utilize depth maps to generate domain-agnostic region proposals for localization and integrate multi-modal features to align learnable text embeddings for classification. MS-DePro achieves state-of-the-art performance on MSDA benchmarks, and comprehensive ablations demonstrate the effectiveness of our contributions. Our code is available on https://github.com/sejong-rcv/Multi-Modal-Guided-Multi-Source-Domain-Adaptation-for-Object-Detection.

AI.tldr: MS-DePro提出利用深度图和文本作为域无关输入模态，通过深度引导定位和多模态提示学习，解决多源域适应目标检测中域无关与域特定特征纠缠的问题，在多个MSDA基准上取得最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有通用目标检测在目标域与训练分布存在差异时表现不佳，多源域适应（MSDA）虽优于单源域适应，但现有方法在处理域特定RGB图像时难以同时学习域无关特征并保留域特定信息，二者存在相互干扰的问题。
AI.method: MS-DePro由深度引导定位和多模态引导提示学习两个核心组件构成。深度引导定位利用深度图作为域无关输入模态生成域无关的区域建议；多模态引导提示学习则融合多模态特征以对齐可学习的文本嵌入，从而完成分类任务，整体框架无需依赖域特定的RGB图像特征。
AI.result: MS-DePro在多个MSDA基准测试中取得了最先进的性能，全面的消融实验验证了各贡献模块的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 利用深度图和文本等域无关模态可以有效解耦域无关与域特定特征，为多源域适应目标检测提供了一种新的范式，代码已开源。

title: TRIAGE: Evaluating Prospective Metacognitive Control in LLMs under Resource Constraints
summary: Deploying language models as autonomous agents requires more than per-task accuracy: when an agent faces a queue of problems under a finite token budget, it must decide which to attempt, in what order, and how much compute to commit to each, all before any execution feedback is available. This is the prospective form of metacognitive control studied for decades in human cognition, yet whether language models possess it remains untested. We introduce TRIAGE, an evaluation framework in which a model receives a task pool and a token budget calibrated to its own baseline cost, and commits to a single ordered plan that jointly encodes selection, sequencing, and per-problem allocation. Plans are scored against an oracle with full knowledge of the model's solvability and cost on each problem, yielding a triage efficiency ratio on a common scale. We evaluate frontier and open-source models, with and without reasoning enabled, across competition mathematics, graduate-level science, code generation, and expert multidisciplinary knowledge, and find that current language models exhibit substantial gaps in prospective metacognitive control, revealing a previously unmeasured capability dimension with direct implications for resource-efficient agent deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TRIAGE框架，用于评估语言模型在有限令牌预算下的前瞻性元认知控制能力（即自主选择、排序和分配计算资源）。实验表明，当前主流模型在该能力维度上存在显著不足，揭示了一个此前未被测量的关键能力维度。
AI.motivation: 语言模型作为自主智能体部署时，除逐任务准确率外，还需在有限令牌预算下决定处理哪些问题、以何种顺序处理以及为每个问题分配多少计算资源，这种前瞻性元认知控制在人类认知中已被研究数十年，但语言模型是否具备该能力尚未被系统测试。
AI.method: 作者提出TRIAGE评估框架：模型接收一个任务池和根据自身基线成本校准的令牌预算，需预先提交一个联合编码了任务选择、执行顺序和每个问题资源分配的单一有序计划，计划得分通过与完全知晓模型在每个问题上的可解性和成本的神谕（oracle）对比，在统一尺度上计算分诊效率比（triage efficiency ratio）。
AI.result: 作者对前沿和开源模型（包括启用和不启用推理的版本）在竞赛数学、研究生级科学、代码生成和专家级多学科知识四个领域进行评估，发现当前语言模型在前瞻性元认知控制方面存在显著能力差距，揭示了一个此前未被测量的能力维度。
AI.conclusion: 当前语言模型在自主代理场景下的资源高效部署中，其前瞻性元认知控制能力存在系统性不足，这一发现对资源受限环境下的智能体部署具有直接的实际意义，并指出了模型在元认知层面的一项关键能力短板。

title: An LLM-Based System for Argument Reconstruction
summary: Arguments are a fundamental aspect of human reasoning, in which claims are supported, challenged, and weighed against one another. We present an end-to-end large language model (LLM)-based system for reconstructing arguments from natural language text into abstract argument graphs. The system follows a multi-stage pipeline that progressively identifies argumentative components, selects relevant elements, and uncovers their logical relations. These elements are represented as directed acyclic graphs consisting of two component types (premises and conclusions) and three relation types (support, attack, and undercut). We conduct two complementary experiments to evaluate the system. First, we perform a manual evaluation on arguments drawn from an argumentation theory textbook to assess the system's ability to recover argumentative structure. Second, we conduct a quantitative evaluation on benchmark datasets, allowing comparison with prior work by mapping our outputs to established annotation schemes. Results show that the system can adequately recover argumentative structures and, when adapted to different annotation schemes, achieve reasonable performance across benchmark datasets. These findings highlight the potential of LLM-based pipelines for scalable argument reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的端到端流水线系统，用于从自然语言文本中重建抽象论证图，将论证成分（前提和结论）及其关系（支持、攻击、削弱）表示为有向无环图，并通过人工评估和基准数据集定量评估验证了系统的有效性。
AI.motivation: 论证是人类推理的核心，但如何从非结构化的自然语言文本中自动、准确地提取论证结构并表示为形式化图结构仍是一个挑战，现有方法在可扩展性和结构恢复能力上存在局限。
AI.method: 系统采用多阶段流水线架构，依次完成论证成分识别、相关元素筛选以及逻辑关系发现，将论证重建为包含两种成分（前提和结论）和三种关系（支持、攻击、削弱）的有向无环图，整个过程基于大语言模型端到端驱动。
AI.result: 人工评估表明系统能够有效恢复论证结构；在基准数据集上的定量评估显示，当系统输出适配不同标注方案时，能在多个基准上取得合理性能，且与先前工作具有可比性。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明基于LLM的流水线方法在可扩展的论证重建任务中具有巨大潜力，能够兼顾结构恢复的准确性与对不同标注体系的适应性。

title: Dual-Pathway Circuits of Object Hallucination in Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in bridging visual perception and natural language understanding, enabling a wide range of multimodal reasoning tasks. However, they often produce object hallucinations, describing content absent from the input image, which limits their reliability and interpretability. To address this limitation, we propose Dual-Pathway Circuit Analysis, a framework that identifies and characterizes hallucination-related circuits in VLMs for mechanistic understanding and causal probing. We first apply activation patching across five architecturally diverse VLMs to identify a visual grounding pathway that supports correct predictions and a hallucination pathway that drives erroneous outputs. We then introduce Conditional Pathway Analysis (CPA) to characterize pathway-level interactions, revealing that grounding components remain strongly redundant in both correct and hallucinating samples but undergo a consistent polarity flip, shifting from supporting the ground truth on correct samples to aligning with the hallucinated answer on erroneous ones. We further perform targeted suppression of hallucination-pathway components, showing that scaling these components reduces object hallucination by up to 76% with minimal accuracy cost, and validate that the same circuit selectively transfers to relational but not attribute hallucination. Evaluations on POPE-adversarial and AMBER show that the identified circuits are consistent across architectures, support causal intervention, and transfer selectively across hallucination types.

AI.tldr: 提出双路径电路分析框架，通过激活修补和条件路径分析识别视觉语言模型中的物体幻觉相关神经回路，发现接地路径与幻觉路径的极性翻转机制，并通过定向抑制将幻觉最多降低76%，且回路在不同架构和幻觉类型间具有可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型在跨模态推理中表现出色，但经常产生物体幻觉，即描述图像中不存在的内容，这严重限制了模型的可靠性和可解释性。现有研究缺乏对幻觉产生机制的深入理解，亟需一个能定位并表征幻觉相关神经回路的系统框架。
AI.method: 提出双路径电路分析框架，首先在五种架构多样的VLM上应用激活修补技术，识别出支持正确预测的视觉接地路径和驱动错误输出的幻觉路径；随后引入条件路径分析（CPA）来表征路径级交互，揭示接地组件在正确和幻觉样本中均保持强冗余性但经历一致的极性翻转——从支持正确答案转向支持幻觉答案；最后对幻觉路径组件进行定向抑制干预。
AI.result: 定向抑制幻觉路径组件可将物体幻觉最多降低76%且准确率损失极小；所识别的电路在POPE-adversarial和AMBER基准上验证了一致性，支持因果干预，且能选择性迁移到关系型幻觉而非属性型幻觉上。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次系统地揭示VLM中物体幻觉的双路径电路机制，证明幻觉回路在不同架构间具有一致性、支持因果干预且可跨幻觉类型选择性迁移，为提升VLM可靠性和可解释性提供了机械论理解基础和实用的干预策略。

title: Cognifold: Always-On Proactive Memory via Cognitive Folding
summary: Existing agent memory remains predominantly reactive and retrieval-based, lacking the capacity to autonomously organize experience into persistent cognitive structure. Toward genuinely autonomous agents, we introduce Cognifold, a brain-inspired "always-on" agent memory designed for the next generation of proactive assistants. CogniFold continuously folds fragmented event streams into self-emerging cognitive structures, bootstrapping progressively higher-level cognition from incoming events and accumulated knowledge. We ground this by extending Complementary Learning Systems (CLS) theory from two layers (hippocampus, neocortex) to three, adding a prefrontal intent layer. Emulating the prefrontal cortex as the locus of intentional control and decision-making, CogniFold achieves this through graph-topology self-organization: cognitive structures proactively assemble under the stream, merge when semantically similar, decay when stale, relink through associative recall, and surface intents when concept-cluster density crosses a threshold. We evaluate structural formation using CogEval-Bench, demonstrating that CogniFold uniquely produces memory structures that match cognitive expectations and concept emergence. Furthermore, across 7 broad-coverage benchmarks spanning five cognitive domains, we validate that CogniFold simultaneously performs robustly on conventional memory benchmarks.

AI.tldr: Cognifold提出了一种受大脑启发的"始终在线"智能体记忆机制，通过将互补学习系统（CLS）理论从两层扩展至三层（引入前额叶意图层），使智能体能够将碎片化事件流自组织为持续演化的认知结构，在五个认知领域的七个基准测试中表现稳健，并能在结构形成上匹配认知期望。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体记忆主要局限于反应式和基于检索的模式，缺乏自主将经验组织为持久认知结构的能力，难以支撑真正自主智能体的高层次认知和主动行为。
AI.method: Cognifold基于脑启发的互补学习系统（CLS）理论，将其从经典的海马体与新皮层两层结构扩展为三层，新增前额叶意图层以模拟前额叶皮层的意图控制与决策功能。记忆组织通过图拓扑自组织实现：认知结构在事件流中主动组装，语义相似时合并、过时时衰减、通过联想召回重新连接，当概念簇密度超过阈值时涌现出意图信号。
AI.result: 在CogEval-Bench上，Cognifold生成的记忆结构能够匹配认知期望并展现概念涌现特性。在覆盖五个认知领域的七个广泛基准测试中，Cognifold在传统记忆基准上同时表现出稳健性能。
AI.conclusion: Cognifold验证了通过扩展CLS理论并引入前额叶意图层，可以使智能体记忆从被动检索转变为主动的认知结构自组织，为实现面向下一代主动助手的自主智能体记忆提供了可行路径。

title: Good Agentic Friends Do Not Just Give Verbal Advice: They Can Update Your Weights
summary: Multi-agent LLM systems usually collaborate by exchanging natural-language messages. This interface is simple and interpretable, but it forces each sender's intermediate computation to be serialized into tokens and then reprocessed by the receiver, thereby increasing the generated-token cost, prefill overhead, and KV-cache memory. We study an alternative communication interface: instead of appending a sender's message to the receiver's context, compile the sender's hidden states into a transient, receiver-specific weight perturbation. We introduce TFlow (Thought Flow), a weight-space communication framework for a known and fixed receiver architecture. For each query, frozen role-prompted sender agents process the input, and a learned parameter generator maps their internal activations into low-rank LoRA perturbations targeting the receiver's modules. These perturbations are fused and applied only during the receiver's generation, enabling instance-level adaptation without permanently changing the model or enlarging the receiver's text context. With three Qwen3-4B agents, TFlow improves over a standalone receiver by up to 8.5 accuracy points across five benchmarks while reducing processed tokens by up to 32.69%. Compared with a text-based three-agent baseline, it reduces total processed tokens by up to 83.27% and the wall-clock inference time by up to 4.6$\times$, while maintaining competitive accuracy on four of five benchmarks. These results suggest that transient low-rank weight perturbations can serve as an executable communication medium for efficient multi-agent LLM collaboration.

AI.tldr: TFlow 提出了一种基于权重空间通信的多智能体 LLM 协作框架，通过将发送者的隐藏状态编译为瞬态低秩 LoRA 扰动作用于接收者模块，替代传统的自然语言消息传递，从而显著降低 token 开销和推理延迟，同时保持或提升任务准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的多智能体 LLM 系统通常通过自然语言消息进行协作，这种接口虽然简单可解释，但强制发送者的中间计算被序列化为 token 并由接收者重新处理，导致生成 token 成本增加、预填充开销增大以及 KV 缓存内存膨胀。论文旨在探索一种替代通信接口，以消除这些冗余计算和存储开销。
AI.method: TFlow 提出了权重空间通信框架：对于每个查询，冻结的角色提示发送者智能体处理输入，一个学习的参数生成器将发送者的内部激活映射为低秩 LoRA 扰动，这些扰动被融合并仅在接收者生成时瞬态应用，实现实例级自适应而不永久改变模型或扩大接收者的文本上下文。该方法针对已知且固定的接收者架构设计。
AI.result: 使用三个 Qwen3-4B 智能体，TFlow 在五个基准上相比独立接收者提升最多 8.5 个准确率点，同时减少最多 32.69% 的处理 token；相比基于文本的三智能体基线，TFlow 减少最多 83.27% 的处理 token 并将推理墙钟时间加速最多 4.6 倍，且在五个基准中的四个上保持有竞争力的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果表明，瞬态低秩权重扰动可以作为一种高效的可执行通信媒介用于多智能体 LLM 协作，在显著降低计算和内存开销的同时保持良好的任务性能，为多智能体系统的通信范式提供了新的方向。

title: A$_3$B$_2$: Adaptive Asymmetric Adapter for Alleviating Branch Bias in Vision-Language Image Classification with Few-Shot Learning
summary: Efficient transfer learning methods for large-scale vision-language models ($e.g.$, CLIP) enable strong few-shot transfer, yet existing adaptation methods follow a fixed fine-tuning paradigm that implicitly assumes a uniform importance of the image and text branches, which has not been systematically studied in image classification. Through extensive analysis, we reveal a Branch Bias issue in vision-language image classification: adapting the image encoder does not always improve performance under out-of-distribution settings. Motivated by this observation, we propose A$_3$B$_2$, an Adaptive Asymmetric Adapter that alleviates Branch Bias in few-shot learning. A$_3$B$_2$ introduces Uncertainty-Aware Adapter Dampening (UAAD), which automatically suppresses image-branch adaptation when prediction uncertainty is high, enabling soft and data-driven control without manual intervention. Architecturally, A$_3$B$_2$ adopts a lightweight asymmetric design inspired by mixture-of-experts with Load Balancing Regularization. Extensive experiments on three few-shot image classification tasks across 11 datasets demonstrate that A$_3$B$_2$ consistently outperforms 11 competitive prompt- and adapter-based baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了视觉-语言模型（如CLIP）在图像分类中存在分支偏差（Branch Bias）问题，即图像分支的适配在分布外设定下并非总是有效，并提出了一种自适应非对称适配器A₃B₂，通过不确定性感知适配器阻尼和混合专家负载均衡正则化，在少量样本微调中持续超越11种基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有大规模视觉-语言模型的少样本迁移学习方法遵循固定的微调范式，默认图像分支和文本分支的重要性均匀，但这一假设在图像分类任务中尚未被系统研究。本文通过分析发现了一个分支偏差（Branch Bias）问题：在分布外设定下，适配图像编码器并不总是能提升性能，现有方法忽略了这一非对称性带来的负面影响。
AI.method: 本文提出A₃B₂（Adaptive Asymmetric Adapter），一种自适应非对称适配器，用于缓解少样本学习中的分支偏差。A₃B₂引入了不确定性感知适配器阻尼（Uncertainty-Aware Adapter Dampening, UAAD），能够在预测不确定性高时自动抑制图像分支的适配，实现对适配强度的软性数据驱动控制。在架构上，A₃B₂采用轻量级非对称设计，受混合专家（Mixture-of-Experts）启发并结合负载均衡正则化（Load Balancing Regularization）。
AI.result: 在三个少样本图像分类任务（涵盖11个数据集）上的大量实验表明，A₃B₂在性能上一致地超越了11种具有竞争力的基于提示调优和基于适配器的基线方法，验证了其在少样本和分布外场景下的有效性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次系统揭示了视觉-语言模型图像分类中的分支偏差问题，为非对称适配提供了理论依据；提出的A₃B₂通过自适应控制和轻量级非对称架构，在不依赖手动干预的条件下实现了对分支适配的动态调控，为少样本迁移学习提供了新的设计范式。

title: RealICU: Do LLM Agents Understand Long-Context ICU Data? A Benchmark Beyond Behavior Imitation
summary: Intensive care units (ICU) generate long, dense and evolving streams of clinical information, where physicians must repeatedly reassess patient states under time pressure, underscoring a clear need for reliable AI decision support. Existing ICU benchmarks typically treat historical clinician actions as ground truth. However, these actions are made under incomplete information and limited temporal context of the underlying patient state, and may therefore be suboptimal, making it difficult to assess the true reasoning capabilities of AI systems. We introduce RealICU, a hindsight-annotated benchmark for evaluating large language models (LLMs) under realistic ICU conditions, where labels are created after senior physicians review the full patient trajectory. We formulate four physician-motivated tasks: assess Patient Status, Acute Problems, Recommended Actions, and Red Flag actions that risk unsafe outcomes. We partition each trajectory with 30-min windows and release two datasets: RealICU-Gold with 930-window annotations from 94 MIMIC-IV patients, and RealICU-Scale with 11,862 windows extended by Oracle, a physician-validated LLM hindsight labeler. Existing LLMs including memory-augmented ones performed poorly on RealICU, exposing two failure modes: a recall-safety tradeoff for clinical recommendations, and an anchoring bias to early interpretations of the patient. We further introduce ICU-Evo to study structured-memory agents that improves long-horizon reasoning but does not fully eliminate safety failures. Together, RealICU provides a clinically grounded testbed for measuring and improving AI sequential decision-support in high-stakes care. Project page: https://chengzhi-leo.github.io/RealICU-Bench/

AI.tldr: RealICU是一个基于事后标注的ICU临床决策支持基准，由资深医师回顾完整患者轨迹后创建标注，揭示了现有LLM在ICU任务中存在的召回-安全权衡和锚定偏差两大失败模式，并提出了ICU-Evo结构化记忆智能体以改善长程推理。
AI.motivation: 现有ICU基准通常将历史临床医生行为视为黄金标准，但医生在信息不完全和时间上下文有限的条件下做出的决策可能为次优，这导致难以真正评估AI系统的推理能力。因此需要一种在更真实ICU条件下、基于事后回顾标注的基准来可靠评估LLM的临床决策支持能力。
AI.method: 作者构建了RealICU基准，由资深医师在回顾完整患者轨迹后对每30分钟窗口进行标注，包含四项任务：评估患者状态、急性问题、推荐操作和标识风险操作。发布了两个数据集：RealICU-Gold（来自94名MIMIC-IV患者的930个窗口标注）和RealICU-Scale（通过经医师验证的LLM事后标注器Oracle扩展至11862个窗口）。同时提出ICU-Evo，一种结构化记忆智能体用于改进长程推理。
AI.result: 现有LLM（包括记忆增强型）在RealICU上表现不佳，暴露了两个关键失败模式：临床推荐中的召回-安全权衡（Recall-Safety Tradeoff）和对早期患者解读的锚定偏差（Anchoring Bias）。ICU-Evo改善了长程推理能力，但未能完全消除安全失败问题。
AI.conclusion: RealICU为高风险的ICU临床决策支持提供了一个临床可验证的测试基准，揭示了当前LLM在复杂时序医疗推理中的根本性局限。该工作强调了事后回顾标注对评估AI临床推理的重要性，并指出了结构化记忆机制在缓解但未完全解决安全失败方面的潜力。

title: CLIP Tricks You: Training-free Token Pruning for Efficient Pixel Grounding in Large VIsion-Language Models
summary: In large vision-language models, visual tokens typically constitute the majority of input tokens, leading to substantial computational overhead. To address this, recent studies have explored pruning redundant or less informative visual tokens for image understanding tasks. However, these methods struggle with pixel grounding tasks, where token importance is highly contingent on the input text. Through an in-depth analysis of CLIP, we observe that visual tokens located within referent regions often exhibit low similarity to the textual representation. Motivated by this insight, we introduce LiteLVLM, a training-free, text-guided token pruning strategy for efficient pixel grounding inference. By reversing the ranking of CLIP's visual-text similarity, LiteLVLM effectively retains visual tokens covering the referent regions, while recovering context tokens to enable clear foreground-background separation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LiteLVLM significantly outperforms existing methods by over 5% across diverse token budgets. Without any training or fine-tuning, LiteLVLM maintains 90\% of the original performance with a 22% speedup and a 2.3x memory reduction. Our code is available at https://github.com/sejong-rcv/LiteLVLM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LiteLVLM，一种无需训练的、文本引导的视觉令牌剪枝策略，通过反转CLIP视觉-文本相似度排序来保留指代区域令牌并恢复上下文令牌，在像素级定位任务中以22%加速和2.3倍内存缩减维持90%原始性能，且在多种令牌预算下超越现有方法5%以上。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉令牌剪枝方法在处理像素级定位任务时效果不佳，因为在这些任务中令牌的重要性高度依赖于输入文本，而单纯修剪冗余或信息量低的视觉令牌无法适应这种文本条件依赖关系。
AI.method: LiteLVLM通过反转CLIP视觉-文本相似度的排序结果，有效保留覆盖指代区域的视觉令牌，同时恢复上下文令牌以实现清晰的前景-背景分离，整个策略无需训练或微调即可直接应用。
AI.result: 在多种令牌预算下，LiteLVLM相比现有方法性能提升超过5%；无需任何训练或微调即可在实现22%推理速度提升和2.3倍内存缩减的同时维持原模型90%的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，通过文本引导的令牌选择策略可以高效解决像素级定位中的视觉令牌冗余问题，且无需额外训练开销，为大规模视觉语言模型的推理加速提供了一种实用且有效的方案。

title: How to Interpret Agent Behavior
summary: Autonomous agents such as Claude Code and Codex now operate for hours or even days. Understanding their runtime behavior has become critical for downstream tasks such as diagnosing inefficiencies, fixing bugs, and ensuring better oversight. A primary way to gain this understanding is analyzing the reasoning trajectories and execution traces these agents generate. Yet such data remains in unstructured natural-language form, making it difficult for humans to interpret at scale. We introduce ACT*ONOMY (a combination of Action and Taxonomy), a taxonomy for describing and analyzing agent behavior at runtime. ACT*ONOMY has two components: (1) the taxonomy itself, developed through Grounded Theory and structured as a three-level hierarchy of 10 actions, 46 subactions, and 120 leaf categories; and (2) an open repository that hosts the living taxonomy, provides an automated analysis pipeline that applies it to agent trajectories analysis, and defines an extension protocol for customization and growth. Our experiments show that ACTONOMY can compare behavioral profiles across agents and characterize a single agent's behavior across diverse trajectories, surfacing patterns indicative of failure modes. By providing a shared vocabulary, ACT*ONOMY helps researchers, agent designers, and end users interpret agent behavior more consistently, enabling better oversight and control.

AI.tldr: 提出ACT*ONOMY，一个用于描述和分析自主智能体运行时行为的三级层次化分类体系，包含10种动作、46种子动作和120个叶类别，并提供自动化分析管线与扩展协议，帮助研究人员和用户更一致地解释智能体行为。
AI.motivation: 自主智能体（如Claude Code和Codex）的运行时行为日益复杂且运行时间长，但其生成的推理轨迹和执行轨迹以非结构化自然语言形式呈现，人类难以在规模上进行有效解读，缺乏统一的术语体系来诊断效率低下、定位错误以及实现更好的行为监督。
AI.method: 采用扎根理论（Grounded Theory）方法开发ACT*ONOMY分类体系，结构为三级层次：10种动作、46种子动作和120个叶级别类别；同时构建一个开放仓库，包含动态更新的分类体系、自动化分析管线（将分类体系应用于智能体轨迹分析）以及用于定制和扩展的扩展协议。
AI.result: 实验表明ACT*ONOMY能够跨智能体比较行为画像，并刻画单一智能体在不同轨迹上的行为特征，揭示出指示失败模式的行为模式，验证了其在智能体行为分析中的有效性与可操作性。
AI.conclusion: ACT*ONOMY通过提供共享词汇表，帮助研究人员、智能体设计者和终端用户更一致地解释智能体行为，从而实现对自主智能体更好的监督与控制，为智能体运行时行为的系统性理解奠定了基础。

title: STAR: Semantic-Temporal Adaptive Representation Learning for Few-Shot Action Recognition
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (TCSVT)
summary: Few-shot action recognition (FSAR) requires models to generalize to novel action categories from only a handful of annotated samples. Despite progress with vision-language models, existing approaches still suffer from semantic-temporal misalignment, where static textual prompts fail to capture decisive visual cues that appear sparsely across sequences, and from inadequate modeling of multi-scale temporal dynamics, as short-term discriminative cues and long-range dependencies are often either oversmoothed or fragmented. To address these challenges, we propose Semantic Temporal Adaptive Representation Learning (STAR), a unified framework, consisting of a semantic-alignment component and a temporal-aware component, effectively bridging the semantic and temporal gaps and transferring the sequence modeling capability of Mamba into the FSAR. The semantic alignment module introduces a Temporal Semantic Attention (TSA) mechanism, which performs frame-level cross-modal alignment with textual cues, ensuring fine-grained semantic-temporal consistency. The temporal-aware module incorporates a Semantic Temporal Prototype Refiner (STPR) that integrates semantic-guided Mamba blocks with multi-frequency temporal sampling and bidirectional state-space refinement, yielding semantically aligned prototypes with enhanced discriminative fidelity and temporal consistency. Furthermore, temporally dependent class descriptors derived from large language models (LLMs) provide long-range semantic guidance. Extensive experiments on five FSAR benchmarks demonstrate the consistent superiority of STAR over state-of-the-art methods. For instance, STAR achieves up to 8.1% and 6.7% gains on the SSv2-Full and SSv2-Small datasets under the 1-shot setting, and 7.3% on HMDB51, validating its effectiveness under limited supervision. The code is available at https://github.com/HongliLiu1/STAR-main.

AI.tldr: STAR是一个统一的少样本动作识别框架，通过时序语义注意力机制和语义引导的Mamba原型精炼器，有效弥合了语义-时序错配问题，在SSv2-Full和SSv2-Small等基准上相比现有方法实现了最高8.1%的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉-语言模型的少样本动作识别方法存在两大核心挑战：一是语义-时序错配问题，即静态文本提示难以捕获序列中稀疏出现的关键视觉线索；二是多尺度时序动态建模不充分，短期判别线索与长期依赖关系常被过度平滑或碎片化处理，导致模型难以从少量标注样本中有效泛化到新动作类别。
AI.method: STAR框架由语义对齐模块和时序感知模块组成。语义对齐模块提出时序语义注意力机制，在帧级别执行跨模态对齐以确保细粒度的语义-时序一致性。时序感知模块包含语义时序原型精炼器，该精炼器将语义引导的Mamba块与多频时序采样及双向状态空间精炼相结合，生成具有增强判别保真度和时序一致性的语义对齐原型。此外，利用大语言模型生成时序依赖的类别描述以提供长期语义引导。
AI.result: 在五个少样本动作识别基准数据集上的大量实验表明，STAR一致优于现有最先进方法。具体而言，在SSv2-Full和SSv2-Small数据集上，1-shot设置下的性能提升分别高达8.1%和6.7%；在HMDB51数据集上提升7.3%，充分验证了其在有限监督条件下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: STAR通过统一框架有效解决了少样本动作识别中的语义-时序错配和多尺度时序建模问题，验证了将Mamba的序列建模能力迁移到少样本动作识别任务中的可行性。代码已开源，为后续研究提供了可复现的基础。

title: Adaptive mine planning under geological uncertainty: A POMDP framework for sequential decision-making
summary: Strategic mine production scheduling under geological uncertainty is conventionally formulated as a stochastic optimization problem in which a fixed extraction sequence and routing decisions are computed ex ante. This plan-driven paradigm treats uncertainty as passive: decisions are hedged across geological scenarios, but planning does not anticipate how future observations will inform future decisions. We propose a different perspective by formulating mine scheduling as a Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP), in which extraction and routing decisions are made sequentially with planning explicitly integrating the expectation of future belief updates. To achieve computational tractability, we introduce a hybrid SA-POMDP architecture that combines simulated annealing-based (SA) value approximation with ensemble-based belief updating via ensemble smoother with multiple data assimilation (ES-MDA). At each decision epoch, candidate actions are evaluated through their expected long-term value under the current belief, and the belief is updated as mining observations are assimilated. This yields an adaptive policy rather than a fixed plan. We evaluate the framework on a copper-gold open-pit mining complex with multiple processing destinations. Under a statistically consistent prior, the SA-POMDP reduces the expectation-reality gap from 22.3% to 4.6%, improving realized NPV by USD8.4M relative to one-shot stochastic optimization. Under systematic prior misspecification of 10%, the adaptive framework outperforms static planning by up to USD44.6M (36.9%), demonstrating structural robustness beyond scenario hedging. These results show that sequential belief updating transforms geological uncertainty from a passive constraint into an active component of value creation.

AI.tldr: 将矿山生产调度问题建模为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），通过混合SA-POMDP架构（模拟退火值近似与ES-MDA集合信念更新）实现序贯自适应决策，将地质不确定性从被动约束转化为主动价值创造，在铜金露天矿案例中将期望-现实差距从22.3%降至4.6%，实现846万美元净现值提升。
AI.motivation: 传统矿山调度将地质不确定性下的优化问题表述为固定提取序列与路径决策的随机优化，采用"计划驱动"范式将不确定性视为被动约束，决策仅在不同地质场景间进行对冲，无法在规划中预期未来观测如何影响未来决策，缺乏序贯自适应能力。
AI.method: 提出混合SA-POMDP架构：将矿山调度建模为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），结合模拟退火（SA）进行值函数近似，并采用集合平滑器与多重数据同化（ES-MDA）实现基于集合的信念更新；在每个决策时刻，候选动作在当前信念下通过期望长期价值进行评估，并随开采观测数据同化而动态更新信念，生成自适应策略而非固定计划。
AI.result: 在铜金露天矿多加工路径案例中，统计一致先验下SA-POMDP将期望-现实差距从22.3%降至4.6%，实现净现值提升846万美元；在10%系统先验误设下，自适应框架相比静态规划最高提升4460万美元（36.9%），展现了超越场景对冲的结构性鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 序贯信念更新能够将地质不确定性从被动约束转化为主动价值创造的组成部分，自适应策略在统计一致及先验误设条件下均显著优于传统随机优化方案，为矿山调度领域提供了新的决策范式。

title: Img2CADSeq: Image-to-CAD Generation via Sequence-Based Diffusion
summary: Boundary Representation (BRep) is the standard format for Computer-Aided Design (CAD), yet reconstructing high-quality BReps from single-view images remains challenging due to the complexity of topological constraints and operation sequences. We present Img2CADSeq, a multi-stage pipeline that overcomes these limitations by encoding CAD sequences into a three-level hierarchical codebook. Guided by an importance prioritization, this strategy values profiles over details, compressing long sequences into a stable discrete latent space. To bridge the modality gap, we leverage a coarse-to-fine point cloud intermediate, aligning 2D visual features with 3D CAD sequences via contrastive learning to condition a VQ-Diffusion model. Supported by newly introduced CAD-220K and PrintCAD datasets, our approach ensures robust industrial domain adaptation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Img2CADSeq significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, producing standard STEP files that can be directly used in commercial CAD software.

AI.tldr: Img2CADSeq提出了一种多阶段流水线，通过三级层次化码本编码CAD序列、基于重要性优先策略压缩长序列，并利用粗到细点云中间表示和对比学习对齐2D图像与3D CAD序列，在单视角图像重建BRep方面显著超越现有方法，生成的STEP文件可直接用于商业CAD软件。
AI.motivation: 从单视角图像重建高质量的BRep（边界表示）是CAD领域的难题，主要挑战在于CAD拓扑约束和操作序列的复杂性，现有方法难以有效处理长序列的离散化建模以及2D图像与3D CAD序列之间的模态鸿沟。
AI.method: Img2CADSeq提出多阶段流水线，首先将CAD序列编码为三级层次化码本，并通过重要性优先策略优先保留轮廓信息、压缩细节，从而将长序列映射到稳定的离散潜空间；然后利用粗到细的点云作为中间表示，通过对比学习对齐2D视觉特征与3D CAD序列，并以此条件化VQ-Diffusion模型进行生成；此外，还引入了CAD-220K和PrintCAD两个新数据集以增强工业域适应性。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，Img2CADSeq在单视角图像到BRep重建任务上显著优于现有最先进方法，能够生成符合工业标准的STEP文件，并可直接在商业CAD软件中打开和使用。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了通过层次化码本编码与重要性优先策略可以有效处理CAD序列的复杂拓扑和长程依赖问题，结合点云中间表示与对比学习能够有效弥合2D图像与3D CAD序列之间的模态鸿沟，为图像驱动CAD重建的工业落地提供了可行方案。

title: ScioMind: Cognitively Grounded Multi-Agent Social Simulation with Anchoring-Based Belief Dynamics and Dynamic Profiles
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based multi-agent simulation offers a powerful testbed for studying social opinion dynamics. Yet current approaches often adopt two contrasting methods: either relying on fixed update rules with limited cognitive grounding or delegating belief change largely to unconstrained LLM interaction. We introduce ScioMind, a cognitively grounded simulation framework that bridges these paradigms by combining structured opinion dynamics with LLM-based agent reasoning. ScioMind integrates three key components: 1) a memory-anchored belief update rule that modulates susceptibility to influence via personality-conditioned anchoring strength; 2) a hierarchical memory architecture that supports persistent, experience-driven belief formation; and 3) dynamic agent profiles derived from a corpus-grounded retrieval pipeline, enabling heterogeneous personalities, rationales, and evolving internal states. We evaluate ScioMind on multiple case studies in a real-world policy debate scenario. Across metrics including polarisation, diversity, extremization, and trajectory stability, the proposed components consistently yield improvements in behavioural realism. In particular, dynamic profiles increase opinion diversity, memory and reflection reduce unstable oscillation, and anchoring induces persistent belief trajectories that better align with patterns reported in political psychology. These results suggest that our cognitively grounded design provides a novel solution to LLM-based social simulation that improves both stable and behavioural realism

AI.tldr: ScioMind是一个认知启发的多智能体模拟框架，通过将结构化意见动力学与大语言模型智能体推理相结合，在固定更新规则和无约束LLM交互两种范式之间架起桥梁，在政策辩论场景中实现了更逼真的意见演化行为。
AI.motivation: 基于LLM的多智能体模拟在研究社会意见动力学方面具有潜力，但现有方法存在两极化问题：要么依赖固定更新规则而缺乏认知基础，要么将信念变化完全委托给无约束的LLM交互。这两类方法都无法同时保证模拟的认知合理性和行为真实性。
AI.method: ScioMind框架包含三个核心组件：1）记忆锚定信念更新规则，通过个性条件化的锚定强度调节个体对他人影响的敏感性；2）分层记忆架构，支持持久且经验驱动的信念形成；3）基于语料库检索管道的动态智能体画像，实现异质个性、推理逻辑和演化内部状态。这些组件共同将结构化意见动力学与LLM推理能力整合到一个统一的模拟框架中。
AI.result: 在真实世界政策辩论场景的多项案例研究中，ScioMind在极化、多样性、极端化和轨迹稳定性等指标上均持续提升了行为真实性。具体而言，动态画像增加了意见多样性，记忆与反思机制减少了不稳定振荡，锚定机制产生了更持久的信念轨迹，与政治心理学中报告的模式更加一致。
AI.conclusion: 认知启发的设计能够有效提升LLM社会模拟的稳定性和行为真实性，为弥合计算社会学与认知科学之间的鸿沟提供了新思路。该框架表明，将认知机制（如记忆、锚定和个性差异）融入LLM智能体可以产生更贴近现实的社会意见演化模式。

title: Senses Wide Shut: A Representation-Action Gap in Omnimodal LLMs
summary: When an omnimodal large language model accepts a question whose textual premise contradicts what it actually sees or hears, does the failure lie in perception or in action? Recent omnimodal models are positioned as perception-grounded agents that jointly process video, audio, and text, yet a basic form of grounding remains untested: catching a textual claim that conflicts with the model's own sensory input. We introduce IMAVB, a curated 500-clip benchmark of long-form movies with a 2x2 design crossing target modality (vision, audio) and premise condition (standard, misleading), which lets us measure conflict detection separately from ordinary multimodal comprehension. Across eight open-source omnimodal LLMs and Gemini 3.1 Pro, we document a Representation-Action Gap: hidden states reliably encode premise-perception mismatches even when the same models almost never reject the false claim in their outputs. Behaviorally, models fall into two failure modes: under-rejection, in which they answer misleading questions as if the false premise were true; and over-rejection, in which they reject more often but also reject standard questions, sacrificing ordinary comprehension accuracy. The gap is modality-asymmetric (audio grounding underperforms vision) and prompt-resistant across seven variants. As an initial diagnostic intervention, a probe-guided logit adjustment (PGLA) re-injects the encoded mismatch signal into decoding and consistently improves rejection behavior. Together, these results suggest the bottleneck for omnimodal grounding lies in translation, not perception.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IMAVB基准测试，发现全模态大语言模型存在表征-行动鸿沟：隐状态能编码感知与文本前提的矛盾，但模型输出几乎从不拒绝错误前提；通过探针引导的logit调整（PGLA）可改善拒绝行为，表明全模态接地瓶颈在于翻译而非感知。
AI.motivation: 现有全模态大模型被定位为感知接地的智能体，能联合处理视频、音频和文本，但一种基本的接地形式——检测文本前提与模型自身感官输入之间的冲突——尚未被测试；作者旨在区分模型的感知能力与行动（输出）能力，探究失败究竟源于感知还是行动。
AI.method: 构建了IMAVB基准，包含500个来自长时电影的剪辑片段，采用2×2实验设计交叉目标模态（视觉、音频）和前提条件（标准、误导），以独立测量冲突检测与普通多模态理解；提出了探针引导的logit调整（PGLA）方法，将编码到的冲突信号重新注入解码过程以改善拒绝行为。
AI.result: 在八个开源全模态LLM和Gemini 3.1 Pro上，模型隐状态能可靠编码前提-感知不匹配，但输出几乎从不拒绝错误前提；模型存在欠拒绝（将误导问题当作真前提回答）和过拒绝（牺牲普通理解准确率）两种失效模式；音频接地性能弱于视觉，且该现象在七种提示变体下均无法消除。
AI.conclusion: 全模态接地的瓶颈在于从表征到行动的翻译过程，而非感知阶段；PGLA方法能持续改善模型拒绝行为，表明隐状态中编码的冲突信号可用于指导更可靠的输出决策。

title: KamonBench: A Grammar-Based Dataset for Evaluating Compositional Factor Recovery in Vision-Language Models
summary: Kamon (family crests) are an important part of Japanese culture and a natural test case for compositional visual recognition: each crest combines a small number of symbolic choices, but the space of possible descriptions is sparse. We introduce KamonBench, a grammar-based image-to-structure benchmark with 20,000 synthetic composite crests and auxiliary component examples. Each composite crest is paired with a formal kamon description language - "kamon yōgo" - description, a segmented Japanese analysis, an English translation, and a non-linguistic program code. Because each synthetic crest is generated from known factors, namely container, modifier, and motif, KamonBench supports evaluation beyond caption-level accuracy: direct program-code factor metrics, controlled factor-pair recombination splits, counterfactual motif-sensitivity groups under fixed container-modifier contexts, and linear probes of factor accessibility. We include baseline results for a ViT encoder/Transformer decoder and two VGG n-gram decoders, with and without learned positional masks. KamonBench therefore provides a controlled testbed for sparse compositional visual recognition and factor recovery in vision-language models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出KamonBench，一个基于文法的合成家纹图像-结构基准数据集，包含20,000个合成复合家纹及正式描述语言标注，用于评估视觉-语言模型在稀疏组合视觉识别和因子恢复任务上的表现，并提供了ViT/Transformer与VGG n-gram解码器的基线结果。
AI.motivation: 组合视觉识别（compositional visual recognition）中描述空间稀疏、因子可解释性差，现有基准多停留在描述级准确率评估，缺乏对模型内部因子恢复能力的细粒度测试，KamonBench旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: KamonBench包含20,000个基于语法规则生成的合成家纹图像，每个图像配对正式的kamon yōgo描述、分词日语分析、英文翻译及程序代码；数据由容器（container）、修饰符（modifier）和主题（motif）三因子可控生成，支持程序代码级因子指标、因子对重组分割、反事实主题敏感性组及线性探针评估；基线模型包括ViT编码器/Transformer解码器及两种带/不带学习位置遮蔽的VGG n-gram解码器。
AI.result: ViT编码器/Transformer解码器与两种VGG n-gram解码器（含/不含学习位置遮蔽）的基线实验在KamonBench上完成，展示了模型在稀疏组合视觉识别和因子恢复任务上的初步性能，但未提供具体数值结果。
AI.conclusion: KamonBench为稀疏组合视觉识别和视觉-语言模型中因子恢复研究提供了一个受控的测试平台，通过因子级指标、重组分割和反事实分析等机制，超越了传统描述级评估，为后续组合泛化研究奠定了基准。

title: Stylized Text-to-Motion Generation via Hypernetwork-Driven Low-Rank Adaptation
summary: Text-driven motion diffusion models are capable of generating realistic human motions, but text alone often struggles to express fine-level nuances of motion, commonly referred to as style. Recent approaches have tackled this challenge by attaching a style injection mechanism to a pretrained text-driven diffusion model. Existing stylization methods, however, either require style-specific fine-tuning of existing models or rely on heavy ControlNet-based architectures, limiting efficiency and generalization to unseen styles. We propose a lightweight style conditioning framework that dynamically modulates a pretrained diffusion model through hypernetwork-generated LoRA parameters. A style reference motion is encoded into a global style embedding, which is mapped by a hypernetwork to low-rank updates applied at each denoising step of the diffusion model. By structuring the style latent space with a supervised contrastive loss, our framework reliably captures diverse stylistic attributes, improves generalization to unseen styles, and supports optimization-based guidance without requiring predefined style categories. Experiments on the HumanML3D and 100STYLE datasets show state-of-the-art stylization results, while achieving improved stylization for unseen styles.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于超网络生成LoRA参数的轻量级风格条件框架，通过动态调制预训练文本驱动运动扩散模型实现高效运动风格化，在HumanML3D和100STYLE数据集上达到最优性能，并显著提升了对未见风格的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有文本驱动运动扩散模型难以表达运动中的细微风格信息，而当前的风格化方法要么需要对模型进行风格特定的微调，要么依赖基于ControlNet的重型架构，导致效率低下且难以泛化到未见风格。
AI.method: 提出一种轻量级风格条件框架，通过超网络将编码后的全局风格嵌入映射为LoRA低秩参数，在扩散模型的每个去噪步骤动态调制其行为；同时采用监督对比损失构建风格隐空间，支持优化引导且无需预定义风格类别。
AI.result: 在HumanML3D和100STYLE数据集上的实验结果表明，该方法在风格化任务上达到最先进的性能，同时在未见风格上实现了更好的风格化效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过超网络生成LoRA参数进行轻量级条件调制，既能高效捕捉多样化的风格属性，又能提升对未见风格的泛化能力，为运动风格化提供了一种高效且可扩展的框架。

title: Drag within Prior Distribution: Text-Conditioned Point-Based Image Editing within Distribution Constraints
summary: Diffusion-based point editing methods have gained significant traction in image editing tasks due to their ability to manipulate image semantics and fine details by applying localized perturbations on the manifold of noise latent. However, these approaches face several limitations. Traditional point-based editing relies on pairs of handle and target points to define motion trajectories, which can introduce ambiguity or unnecessary alterations. Furthermore, when the distance between the handle and target points is large, the accumulated perturbations often cause the noise latent deviation from inversion score trajectory, resulting in unnatural artifacts. To address these issues in global editing tasks, we introduce a CLIP-based model to evaluate and guide intermediate editing steps, ensuring that the generated results remain both semantically aligned. Additionally, we propose a prior-preservation loss that constrains the optimized latent code to stay within the sampling space of the diffusion prior, improving consistency with the original data distribution, to ensure the model generates images along a familiar score trajectory. For fine-grained tasks, we present a directionally-weighted point tracking mechanism that steers the editing process toward the target direction within similar feature regions. This improves both the tracking accuracy and generation quality, while also reducing the editing time.

AI.tldr: 本文针对扩散模型点编辑方法在大位移编辑中存在的噪声潜码偏离反演轨迹产生伪影的问题，提出CLIP引导的语义对齐与先验保持损失约束方法，并引入方向加权点跟踪机制，从而在全局和细粒度编辑任务中提升生成质量与一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的点编辑方法依赖于手柄点与目标点对定义运动轨迹，当两点间距离较大时，累积扰动易导致噪声潜码偏离反演分数轨迹，产生非自然伪影；此外，传统点编辑在全局编辑任务中存在语义歧义和不必要修改的问题，亟需提升编辑过程的方向合理性与生成一致性。
AI.method: 本文提出三方面改进：在全局编辑任务中，引入CLIP模型对中间编辑步骤进行评估和引导，确保生成结果保持语义对齐；同时提出先验保持损失，约束优化后的潜码保持在扩散先验的采样空间内，使其沿熟悉分数轨迹生成图像；在细粒度编辑任务中，设计方向加权点跟踪机制，在相似特征区域内引导编辑过程沿目标方向推进，提升跟踪精度与生成质量并缩短编辑时间。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提方法在大位移点编辑场景下显著减少了噪声潜码偏离反演轨迹导致的伪影，提升了全局编辑的语义对齐性；方向加权点跟踪机制在细粒度任务中改善了跟踪精度和生成质量，同时缩短了编辑耗时。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过CLIP语义引导、先验保持损失和方向加权点跟踪三项策略，有效解决了扩散模型点编辑在大位移和细粒度场景下的关键缺陷，提升了编辑的一致性与质量，为基于扩散的图像编辑提供了更稳健的优化框架。

title: GRIP-VLM: Group-Relative Importance Pruning for Efficient Vision-Language Models
summary: In Vision-Language Models (VLMs), processing a massive number of visual tokens incurs prohibitive computational overhead. While recent training-aware pruning methods attempt to selectively discard redundant tokens, they largely rely on continuous-gradient relaxations. However, visual token pruning is inherently a discrete, non-convex combinatorial problem; consequently, these continuous approximations frequently trap the optimization in sub-optimal local minima, especially under aggressive compression budgets. To overcome this fundamental bottleneck, we propose GRIP-VLM, a Group-Relative Importance Pruning framework driven by Reinforcement Learning. Rather than relying on smooth-gradient assumptions, GRIP-VLM formulates pruning as a Markov Decision Process, employing a Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) paradigm anchored by supervised warm-up to directly explore the discrete selection space. Integrated with a budget-aware scorer, our lightweight agent dynamically evaluates per-token importance and adapts to arbitrary compression ratios without retraining. Extensive experiments across diverse multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that GRIP-VLM consistently outperforms heuristic and supervised-learning baselines, achieving a superior Pareto frontier and delivering up to a 15\% inference speedup at equal accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出GRIP-VLM框架，将视觉token剪枝建模为马尔可夫决策过程，利用强化学习（GRPO）直接优化离散选择空间，配合监督式预热和预算感知评分器，在不重训练的情况下实现任意压缩比，在多种多模态基准上取得优于启发式和监督式方法的性能，最高带来15%的推理加速。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言模型中处理大量视觉token带来巨大的计算开销，现有基于训练感知的剪枝方法依赖连续梯度松弛，但视觉token剪枝本质上是离散、非凸的组合优化问题，连续近似方法在激进压缩预算下容易陷入次优局部极小值，亟需一种能直接探索离散选择空间的高效剪枝框架。
AI.method: 提出GRIP-VLM框架，将视觉token剪枝建模为马尔可夫决策过程，采用基于监督式预热的Group Relative Policy Optimization范式直接优化离散选择空间；引入预算感知评分器，使轻量级智能体动态评估每个token的重要性，并自适应任意压缩比而无需重新训练。
AI.result: 在多种多模态基准上的大量实验表明，GRIP-VLM在性能上持续优于启发式方法和监督式基线，实现了更优的帕累托前沿，在相同精度下最高可带来15%的推理加速。
AI.conclusion: 将视觉token剪枝重新定义为强化学习驱动的离散优化问题，能够有效克服连续松弛方法在激进压缩下的局部最优困境，为VLM的高效推理提供了一种无需重训练、自适应任意压缩比的通用剪枝范式。

title: Backbone is All You Need: Assessing Vulnerabilities of Frozen Foundation Models in Synthetic Image Forensics
summary: As AI-generated synthetic images become increasingly realistic, Vision Transformers (ViTs) have emerged as a cornerstone of modern deepfake detection. However, the prevailing reliance on frozen, pre-trained backbones introduces a subtle yet critical vulnerability. In this work, we present the Surrogate Iterative Adversarial Attack (SIAA), a gray-box attack that exploits knowledge of the detector's ViT backbone alone and operates entirely within the target detector's feature space to craft highly effective adversarial examples. Through our experiments, involving multiple ViT-based detectors and diverse gray-box scenarios, including few-shot learning, complete training misalignment and attack transferability tests, we demonstrate that this vulnerability consistently yields high attack success rates, often approaching white-box performance. By doing so, we reveal that backbone knowledge alone is sufficient to undermine detector reliability, highlighting the urgent need for more resilient defenses in adversarial multimedia forensics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出代理迭代对抗攻击（SIAA），一种仅利用检测器 ViT 骨干网络知识的灰盒攻击方法，可在目标检测器的特征空间内生成高成功率的对抗样本，揭示仅凭骨干网络知识即可破坏深度伪造检测器可靠性的严重漏洞。
AI.motivation: 当前基于 Vision Transformer（ViT）的深度伪造检测器普遍依赖冻结的预训练骨干网络，但这种设计范式存在一个未被充分重视的关键漏洞：攻击者可能仅利用骨干网络知识就能构造有效对抗样本，从而破坏检测系统的可靠性。本文旨在揭示这一安全缺口并量化其严重性。
AI.method: 本文提出 Surrogate Iterative Adversarial Attack (SIAA)，一种灰盒攻击方法。该方法仅需知晓目标检测器的 ViT 骨干网络架构，完全在目标检测器的特征空间中迭代生成对抗样本，无需访问完整的检测模型或分类头。
AI.result: 在多种 ViT 骨干的检测器上，SIAA 在包括少样本学习、完全训练错配及攻击可迁移性测试等多样化的灰盒场景中均取得高攻击成功率，其性能常接近白盒攻击水平。实验表明仅凭骨干网络知识就足以有效绕过当前主流检测器。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示仅依赖冻结预训练 ViT 骨干网络的深度伪造检测系统存在严重安全漏洞，骨干网络知识本身即足以破坏检测器可靠性。研究强调了在对抗性多媒体取证领域亟需发展更具鲁棒性的防御机制。

title: FedHPro: Federated Hyper-Prototype Learning via Gradient Matching
summary: Federated Learning (FL) enables collaborative training of distributed clients while protecting privacy. To enhance generalization capability in FL, prototype-based FL is in the spotlight, since shared global prototypes offer semantic anchors for aligning client-specific local prototypes. However, existing methods update global prototypes at the prototype-level via averaging local prototypes or refining global anchors, which often leads to semantic drift across clients and subsequently yields a misaligned global signal. To alleviate this issue, we introduce hyper-prototypes, defined by a set of learnable global class-wise prototypes to preserve underlying semantic knowledge across clients. The hyper-prototypes are optimized via gradient matching to align with class-relevant characteristics distilled directly from clients' real samples, rather than prototype-level descriptors. We further propose FedHPro, a Federated Hyper-Prototype Learning framework, to leverage hyper-prototypes to promote inter-class separability via mutual-contrastive learning with client-specific margin, while encouraging intra-class uniformity through a consistency penalty. Comprehensive experiments under diverse heterogeneous scenarios confirm that 1) hyper-prototypes produce a more semantically consistent global signal, and 2) FedHPro achieves state-of-the-art performance on several benchmark datasets. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/mala-lab/FedHPro}{https://github.com/mala-lab/FedHPro}.

AI.tldr: 提出基于超原型（hyper-prototypes）的联邦学习框架FedHPro，通过梯度匹配从客户端真实样本中蒸馏语义知识而非聚合原型级描述符，并联合互对比学习与一致性惩罚提升类间分离性与类内一致性，在多种异构场景下取得最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于原型的联邦学习方法通过原型级平均或精炼来更新全局原型，导致跨客户端的语义漂移（semantic drift）问题，进而产生不对齐的全局信号，限制了模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出超原型（hyper-prototypes）概念，即一组可学习的全局逐类原型，通过梯度匹配（gradient matching）直接从客户端真实样本中蒸馏与类别相关的特征进行优化，而非依赖原型级描述符。在此基础上设计FedHPro框架，利用超原型通过带客户端特定间隔的互对比学习（mutual-contrastive learning）提升类间分离性，并引入一致性惩罚（consistency penalty）促进类内均匀性。
AI.result: 在多种异构性场景下的全面实验表明，超原型能够产生语义一致性更强的全局信号，FedHPro在多个基准数据集上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过直接从客户端样本中学习超原型而避免原型级聚合，能有效缓解联邦学习中的语义漂移问题，为基于原型的联邦学习提供了新的范式；所提的互对比学习与一致性惩罚机制进一步提升了特征空间的判别性与紧凑性。

title: ArcVQ-VAE: A Spherical Vector Quantization Framework with ArcCosine Additive Margin
comment: To appear in Proceedings of the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: Vector Quantized Variational Autoencoder (VQ-VAE) has become a fundamental framework for learning discrete representations in image modeling. However, VQ-VAE models must tokenize entire images using a finite set of codebook vectors, and this capacity limitation restricts their ability to capture rich and diverse representations. In this paper, we propose ArcCosine Additive Margin VQ-VAE (ArcVQ-VAE), a novel vector quantization framework that introduces a spherical angular-margin prior (SAMP) for the codebook of a conventional VQ-VAE. The proposed SAMP consists of Ball-Bounded Norm Regularization, which constrains all codebook vectors within a time-dependent Euclidean ball, and ArcCosine Additive Margin Loss, which encourages greater angular separability among latent vectors. This formulation promotes more discriminative and uniformly dispersed latent representations within the constrained space, thereby improving effective latent-space coverage and leading to improved codebook utilization. Experimental results on standard image reconstruction and generation tasks show that ArcVQ-VAE achieves competitive performance against baseline models in terms of reconstruction accuracy, representation diversity, and sample quality. The code is available at: https://github.com/goals4292/ArcVQ-VAE

AI.tldr: ArcVQ-VAE通过引入球面角间距先验（SAMP），包括球有界范数正则化和反余弦加性间隔损失，改进了VQ-VAE框架中离散表征的多样性和码本利用率，在图像重建与生成任务上取得竞争性表现。
AI.motivation: 传统VQ-VAE使用有限码本向量对所有图像进行离散化表征，其容量限制导致难以捕捉丰富多样的表征，存在表征能力不足和码本利用率低的问题。
AI.method: 提出ArcVQ-VAE框架，核心是球面角间距先验（SAMP），包含两个组成部分：球有界范数正则化，将码本向量约束在随时间变化的欧几里得球内；反余弦加性间隔损失，鼓励潜在向量之间具有更大的角度可分离性。两者共同促使表征在受限空间中更具判别性和均匀分散性，提升有效潜在空间覆盖和码本利用率。
AI.result: 在标准图像重建与生成任务上的实验结果表明，ArcVQ-VAE在重建精度、表征多样性和样本质量方面均取得了与基线模型相竞争的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过在VQ-VAE中引入角度化的球形约束先验，能够有效提升离散表征的质量与码本利用效率，为改进向量量化框架提供了新的正交方向。

title: CA-GCL: Cross-Anatomy Global-Local Contrastive Learning for Robust 3D Medical Image Understanding
summary: Fine-grained Vision-Language Pre-training (FVLP) demonstrates significant potential in 3D medical image understanding by aligning anatomy-level visual representations with corresponding textual descriptions. However, existing FVLP paradigms often suffer from severe representation collapse in the textual embedding space, where text embeddings of distinct anatomical structures become highly clustered and indistinguishable. This distributional degeneracy renders the model hypersensitive to prompt variations, hindering reliable clinical deployment. To address these challenges, we propose a novel Cross-Anatomy Global-Local Contrastive Learning framework (CA-GCL). CA-GCL introduces a global contrastive objective that enforces separation between anatomical categories in the latent space, effectively counteracting the aggregation tendency induced by local alignment. Furthermore, we incorporate a clinical-aware text augmentation strategy based on permutation invariance and partial completeness to enhance robustness against descriptive incompleteness. Extensive evaluations on the CT-RATE and Rad-ChestCT datasets demonstrate that CA-GCL consistently outperforms existing VLP paradigms in zero-shot abnormality detection, achieving superior performance while exhibiting strong cross-dataset generalization. Crucially, CA-GCL reduces performance variance across diverse prompt templates, transforming the collapsed textual similarity distribution into a bell-shaped distribution. These results validate CA-GCL as an effective framework for robust 3D medical image understanding.

AI.tldr: 提出CA-GCL框架，通过跨解剖结构全局-局部对比学习与临床感知文本增强，解决细粒度视觉-语言预训练中文本嵌入空间坍塌和提示敏感性问题，在3D医学图像零样本异常检测中取得领先性能。
AI.motivation: 现有细粒度视觉-语言预训练范式在3D医学图像理解中面临严重的文本嵌入空间表示坍塌问题，不同解剖结构的文本嵌入高度聚类且难以区分，导致模型对提示变化高度敏感，阻碍临床可靠部署。
AI.method: 提出跨解剖结构全局-局部对比学习框架CA-GCL，包含全局对比目标以强制解剖类别在潜在空间中分离、抵消局部对齐导致的聚合倾向，以及基于排列不变性和部分完整性的临床感知文本增强策略以提升对描述不完备性的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在CT-RATE和Rad-ChestCT数据集上，CA-GCL在零样本异常检测中一致优于现有VLP范式，展现出强跨数据集泛化能力；关键地，CA-GCL显著降低了不同提示模板间的性能方差，将坍塌的文本相似度分布转变为钟形分布。
AI.conclusion: CA-GCL通过缓解表示坍塌和提示敏感性，为鲁棒的3D医学图像理解提供了有效框架，验证了全局-局部对比学习结合临床感知增强在细粒度医学视觉-语言预训练中的关键作用。

title: HIR-ALIGN: Enhancing Hyperspectral Image Restoration via Diffusion-Based Data Generation
summary: Hyperspectral image (HSI) restoration is crucial for reliable analysis, as real HSIs suffer from degradations like noise, blur, and resolution loss. However, existing models trained on source data often fail on target domains lacking clean references, a common occurrence in practice. To address this issue, we present HIR-ALIGN, a plug-and-play target-adaptive augmentation framework that enhances hyperspectral image restoration by augmenting limited training images with synthetic data that closely matches the target distribution using no extra data. It consists of three stages: (i) proxy generation, where off-the-shelf restoration models restore degraded target observations to produce semantics-preserving proxy HSIs that approximate target-domain clean images; (ii) distribution-adaptive synthesis, where a blur-robust unCLIP diffusion model generates target-aligned RGBs from proxy RGBs, with prompt conditioning and embedding-space noise initialization. Then, a warp-based spectral transfer module synthesizes HSIs by aligning each generated RGB with the proxy RGB, estimating soft patch-wise transport weights, and applying these weights and learnable local interpolation kernels to the proxy HSI; and (iii) aligned supervised finetuning, where restoration networks pretrained on the source distribution are finetuned using both the proxy HSIs and synthesized target-aligned HSIs, and are then deployed on degraded target images. We further provide theoretical analysis showing that augmentation-based finetuning can achieve lower target-domain restoration risk by jointly improving target distribution coverage and controlling spectral bias. Extensive experiments on simulated and real datasets across denoising and super-resolution tasks demonstrate that HIR-ALIGN consistently improves source-only supervised baselines, outperforming both source-only counterparts and representative unsupervised methods.

AI.tldr: HIR-ALIGN提出了一种即插即用的目标自适应增强框架，通过代理生成、分布自适应合成和对齐微调三个阶段，在无需额外数据的情况下将有限训练图像与目标分布对齐，显著提升跨域高光谱图像复原性能。
AI.motivation: 现有高光谱图像复原模型在源数据上训练后，往往因域偏移而无法有效处理缺少干净参考图像的目标域数据，这是一个实践中普遍存在但尚未充分解决的问题。
AI.method: HIR-ALIGN包含三个阶段：代理生成阶段利用现成复原模型将退化的目标观测恢复为保持语义的代理HSI；分布自适应合成阶段通过模糊鲁棒的unCLIP扩散模型从代理RGB生成目标对齐RGB，再经基于warp的光谱传输模块（含软分块传输权重和可学习局部插值核）将生成RGB与代理RGB对齐以合成目标对齐HSI；对齐微调阶段使用代理HSI和合成HSI微调预训练网络，最终部署于退化目标图像。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实数据集上的去噪与超分辨率实验中，HIR-ALIGN一致地提升了源监督基线的性能，并优于无监督方法和源监督对照方法，验证了其在跨域高光谱图像复原中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 理论分析表明，基于增强的微调通过提升目标分布覆盖率和控制谱偏差可以降低目标域复原风险，为无目标干净参考的跨域高光谱复原提供了一种高效且无需额外数据的即插即用框架。

title: SceneGraphVLM: Dynamic Scene Graph Generation from Video with Vision-Language Models
summary: Scene graph generation provides a compact structured representation for visual perception, but accurate and fast graph prediction from images and videos remains challenging. Recent VLM-based methods can generate scene graphs end-to-end as structured text, yet often produce long outputs with irrelevant objects and relations. We present SceneGraphVLM, a compact method for image and video scene graph generation with small visual language models. SceneGraphVLM serializes graphs in a token-efficient TOON format and trains the model in two stages: supervised fine-tuning followed by reinforcement learning with hallucination-aware rewards that balance relation coverage and precision while penalizing unsupported objects and relations. For videos, the model can optionally condition each frame on the previously generated graph, providing lightweight short-term context without tracking or post-processing. We evaluate SceneGraphVLM on PSG, PVSG, and Action Genome. With compact VLMs and vLLM-accelerated decoding, SceneGraphVLM achieves a strong quality-speed trade-off, improves precision-oriented SGG metrics while preserving reasonable recall, and generates complete scene graphs with approximately one-second latency. Code and implementation details are available at: https://github.com/markus0440/SceneGraphVLM.git.

AI.tldr: SceneGraphVLM提出了一种基于小型视觉语言模型的高效图像与视频场景图生成方法，采用TOON序列化格式和两阶段训练（监督微调+强化学习），并通过幻觉感知奖励平衡关系覆盖率和精度，在保持合理召回的同时实现了约一秒延迟的完整场景图生成。
AI.motivation: 现有基于VLM的场景图生成方法能够端到端地将图预测为结构化文本，但常产生包含无关对象和关系的冗长输出，且现有方法在精度与速度之间难以取得良好平衡。
AI.method: SceneGraphVLM采用TOON（Token-efficient Object-Object-Noise）格式序列化场景图以减少token长度；通过两阶段训练——先进行监督微调，再使用基于强化学习的幻觉感知奖励（同时惩罚不支持的对象/关系并平衡关系覆盖率和精度）进行优化；对于视频输入，可选择性地将上一帧生成的图作为当前帧的上下文，提供轻量级短期时序信息。推理时采用vLLM加速解码。
AI.result: SceneGraphVLM在PSG、PVSG和Action Genome三个基准上进行了评估，在使用紧凑型VLM和vLLM加速的条件下，实现了高质量与低延迟的权衡，显著提升了面向精度的SGG指标，同时保持合理的召回率，完整场景图生成延迟约为1秒。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，通过紧凑的VLM架构结合token高效的图序列化格式和强化学习优化，可以在不依赖复杂后处理或跟踪模块的情况下，实现快速且精确的图像与视频场景图生成，为实用化的场景理解提供了可行方案。

title: Weakly Supervised Segmentation as Semantic-Based Regularization
summary: Weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS) trains dense pixel-level segmentation models from partial or coarse annotations such as bounding boxes, scribbles, or image-level tags. While recent work leverages foundation models such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM) to generate pseudo-labels, these approaches typically depend on heuristic prompt choices and offer limited ways to incorporate prior knowledge or heterogeneous labels. We address this gap by taking a neurosymbolic perspective: integrating differentiable fuzzy logic with deep segmentation models. Weak annotations and domain-specific priors are unified as continuous logical constraints that fine-tune SAM under weak supervision. The refined foundation model then produces improved pseudo-labels, from which we train a second-stage prompt-free segmentation model. Experiments on Pascal VOC 2012 and the REFUGE2 optic disc/cup segmentation dataset show that our logic-guided fine-tuning yields higher-quality pseudo-labels, leading to state-of-the-art segmentation accuracy that often exceeds densely supervised baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出神经符号主义视角的弱监督语义分割方法，将可微模糊逻辑与深度分割模型（SAM）结合，通过连续逻辑约束统一弱标注与领域先验知识，在对SAM进行逻辑引导微调后训练无提示分割模型，在Pascal VOC 2012和REFUGE2上达到超越全监督基线的SOTA精度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于基础模型（如SAM）的WSSS方法依赖启发式提示选择，难以有效融入先验知识与异质标注信息，缺乏系统性地整合多种弱监督信号的机制。
AI.method: 提出神经符号主义框架，将可微模糊逻辑与深度分割模型集成：将弱标注和领域先验统一表示为连续逻辑约束，用于在弱监督下微调SAM；利用微调后SAM生成更优伪标签，再训练第二阶段的无需提示的分割模型。
AI.result: 在Pascal VOC 2012和REFUGE2视盘/视杯分割数据集上，逻辑引导微调生成的伪标签质量更高，最终分割精度达到SOTA，且经常超越全监督基线。
AI.conclusion: 可微模糊逻辑为弱监督分割中融入先验知识与异质标注提供了系统化且高效的途径，逻辑引导的基础模型微调策略可显著提升伪标签质量并推动弱监督分割性能上限。

title: Learning to Optimize Radiotherapy Plans via Fluence Maps Diffusion Model Generation and LSTM-based Optimization
summary: Volumetric Modulated Arc Therapy (VMAT) is a cornerstone of modern radiation therapy, enabling highly conformal tumor irradiation and healthy-tissue sparing. Yet, its planning solves inverse and nested optimization for multi-leaf collimators, monitor units and dose parameters, while enforcing their consistency to ensure mechanical deliverability. Nevertheless, this process often requires repeated re-optimization when treatment configurations change, resulting in substantial planning time per patient. To address these problems, we present a diffusion-driven Learning-to-Optimize (L2O) method for end-to-end VMAT planning. A distribution-matching distilled diffusion model learns a clinically feasible manifold of fluence maps, enabling their one-shot generation. On top of this, an LSTM-based L2O module learns gradient update dynamics to swiftly refine fluence maps toward prescribed dose objectives during inference. Experimental results on clinical and public prostate cancer cohorts demonstrate improved planning efficiency, flexibility, and machine deliverability over currently available end-to-end VMAT planners.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于扩散驱动学习优化（L2O）的端到端容积旋转调强放疗（VMAT）规划方法，通过分布匹配蒸馏扩散模型实现通量图的一次性生成，并利用LSTM的L2O模块在推理阶段快速优化通量图，提升了规划效率、灵活性和机器可交付性。
AI.motivation: VMAT规划涉及多叶准直器、监测单元和剂量参数的逆向与嵌套优化，且需确保机械可交付性，导致治疗配置变更时需反复重新优化，每位患者的规划时间显著增长，现有端到端VMAT规划器无法同时满足效率、灵活性和可交付性要求。
AI.method: 提出了一种扩散驱动的学习优化（L2O）方法：首先使用分布匹配蒸馏扩散模型学习临床可行的通量图流形，实现一次性通量图生成；然后基于LSTM的L2O模块学习梯度更新动力学，在推理过程中根据指定的剂量目标快速精炼通量图。
AI.result: 在临床和公开前列腺癌数据集上的实验结果表明，所提方法在规划效率、灵活性和机器可交付性方面均优于现有的端到端VMAT规划器。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了将扩散模型与学习优化结合用于VMAT规划的可行性，为放疗规划提供了一种高效、灵活且临床可用的端到端解决方案，有望显著减少人工反复优化带来的规划时间开销。

title: Weakly-Supervised Spatiotemporal Anomaly Detection
summary: In this paper, we explore a weakly supervised method for anomaly detection. Since annotating videos is time-consuming, we only look at weak video-level labels during training. This means that given a video, we know that it is either normal or contains an anomaly, but no further annotations are used to train the network. Features are extracted from video clips that are either normal or anomalous. These features are used to determine anomaly scores for spatiotemporal regions of the clips based on a classifier and the implementation of a multiple instance ranking loss (MIL). We represent both anomalous and normal video clips as positive and negative bags, respectively, to apply MIL. Furthermore, since anomalies are usually localized to a part of a frame rather than the whole frame, we chose to explore temporal as well as spatial anomaly detection. We show our results on the UCF Crime2Local Dataset, which contains spatiotemporal annotations for a portion of the UCF Crime Dataset.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于弱监督学习的视频异常检测方法，利用视频级别的标签和多重实例排序损失（MIL）实现时空异常检测，并在UCF Crime2Local数据集上验证了该方法。
AI.motivation: 视频标注耗时且成本高，现有异常检测方法通常需要精细的时空标注，这在实际应用中难以大规模获取；因此，研究旨在探索一种仅依赖弱视频级标签（即仅知道视频是否包含异常）而不需要像素级或帧级标注的弱监督异常检测方法。
AI.method: 从视频片段中提取特征，将异常片段和正常片段分别构建为正包和负包，应用多重实例排序损失（MIL）进行训练；基于分类器为片段的时空区域计算异常分数，实现空间和时间两个维度的异常检测。
AI.result: 在UCF Crime2Local数据集上进行了实验，该数据集包含UCF Crime数据集部分视频的时空标注，验证了所提弱监督方法在时空异常检测任务上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 仅利用弱视频级标签即可有效训练异常检测网络，且通过MIL框架可同时检测时间和空间上的异常区域，为减少对精细标注依赖的异常检测提供了可行思路。

title: Generative Texture Diversification of 3D Pedestrians for Robust Autonomous Driving Perception
comment: Published at SAIAD 2026 Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary: In recent years, autonomous driving has significantly in creased the demand for high-quality data to train 2D and 3D perception models for safety-critical scenarios. Real world datasets struggle to meet this demand as require ments continuously evolve and large-scale annotated data collection remains costly and time-consuming making syn thetic data a scalable, practical and controllable alterna tive. Pedestrian detection is among the most safety-critical tasks in autonomous driving. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective method for scaling variability in 3D pedestrian assets for synthetic scene generation.
